what_it_does: This file is a metadata ledger entry that records an attachment (att-6178e5ff) of type board_items, linking the dragnet-development channel to the board item board://item-eecdb67a, with an added timestamp.
observations: Contains only YAML frontmatter and no additional body content.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-eecdb67a.
standouts: board_items attachment type with a board:// URI target
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for metadata fields.
Stores channel attachment records as individual markdown files.
References external board items with a board:// URI scheme.
concerns: No contextual description of what the referenced board item contains.
Target URI cannot be resolved from the contents of this file alone.
No author or provenance information beyond the timestamp.
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub that points to a board item but carries no payload or context about the item itself.
questions: What content or state does board item item-eecdb67a represent?
What does attachment_type board_items imply about the relationship or expected rendering?
Why is this attachment recorded under the dragnet-development channel?
Is there a corresponding message or conversation that this attachment belongs to?
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, queryable record that a specific board item was attached to or referenced from a channel context.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference an external board item rather than a local file path.
contribution: Provides a timestamped association between attachment id att-6178e5ff, the dragnet-development channel, and board item item-eecdb67a.
summary_for_embedding: A markdown ledger stub recording attachment att-6178e5ff as a board_items reference from dragnet-development to board item item-eecdb67a with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a channel attachment record that links a board item to a development channel for later retrieval or provenance.
